When_files_are_added_or_modified.description: Polls the configured SFTP folder for new or modified files.

Get_file_content.description: Downloads the file content from the SFTP server.

Compute_content_hash.description: Computes MD5 hash of the file content for duplicate detection.

Generate_file_id.description: Generates a unique file ID for the SFTP record.

body.query: SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.sftpPath = @@sftpPath AND c.contentHash = @@contentHash AND c.intakeSource = 'sftp'

Check_for_duplicate.description: Queries Cosmos DB for existing record with same sftpPath and contentHash.

Log_duplicate_warning.description: Logs duplicate detection. File is NOT moved from SFTP folder.

Parse_filename_metadata.description: Strips extension and splits filename by configurable delimiter.

Extract_metadata_fields.description: Extracts positional metadata fields and converts YYYYMMDD dates to ISO 8601.

Upload_to_blob_storage.description: Uploads file to blob storage at /attachments/sftp-{fileId}/{filename}.

Create_Cosmos_DB_record.description: Creates intake record in Cosmos DB with parsed metadata and status 'received'.

Upload_CSV_to_SharePoint.description: Uploads CSV file to SharePoint via Graph API with structured folder path.

Update_Cosmos_CSV_archived.description: Updates Cosmos DB record with sharepointPath and status 'archived'.

Archive_CSV_on_SFTP.description: Moves CSV file from inbox to archive folder on SFTP.

Upload_XLSX_to_SharePoint.description: Uploads XLSX file to SharePoint via Graph API with structured folder path.

Update_Cosmos_XLSX_archived.description: Updates Cosmos DB record with sharepointPath and status 'archived'.

Archive_XLSX_on_SFTP.description: Moves XLSX file from inbox to archive folder on SFTP.

Upload_XLS_to_SharePoint.description: Uploads XLS file to SharePoint via Graph API with structured folder path.

Update_Cosmos_XLS_archived.description: Updates Cosmos DB record with sharepointPath and status 'archived'.

Archive_XLS_on_SFTP.description: Moves XLS file from inbox to archive folder on SFTP.

body.ContentData:
@{base64(concat('{','
','  "fileId": "', outputs('Generate_file_id'), '",','
','  "originalFilename": "', triggerBody()?['Name'], '",','
','  "fileType": "pdf",','
','  "blobPath": "/attachments/sftp-', outputs('Generate_file_id'), '/', triggerBody()?['Name'], '",','
','  "intakeSource": "sftp",','
','  "receivedAt": "', utcNow(), '",','
','  "sftpPath": "', triggerBody()?['Path'], '",','
','  "contentHash": "', outputs('Compute_content_hash'), '",','
','  "fileSize": ', triggerBody()?['Size'], ',','
','  "account": "', outputs('Extract_metadata_fields')?['account'], '",','
','  "fund": "', outputs('Extract_metadata_fields')?['fund'], '",','
','  "docType": "', outputs('Extract_metadata_fields')?['docType'], '",','
','  "docName": "', outputs('Extract_metadata_fields')?['docName'], '",','
','  "publishedDate": "', outputs('Extract_metadata_fields')?['publishedDate'], '",','
','  "effectiveDate": "', outputs('Extract_metadata_fields')?['effectiveDate'], '"','
','}'))}

Send_PDF_to_Service_Bus.description: Sends SFTP PDF intake message to email-intake Service Bus queue for agent processing.

Update_Cosmos_PDF_queued.description: Updates Cosmos DB record with queue destination for PDF routing.

Archive_PDF_on_SFTP.description: Moves PDF file from inbox to archive folder on SFTP.

inputs.action: Skipped - file not processed, not moved

Log_unsupported_file_type.description: Logs unsupported file type. File is NOT moved from SFTP folder.

Route_by_file_type.description: Routes file by extension: CSV/Excel → SharePoint, PDF → Service Bus, Other → skip.

body.metadataParseError: Expected 6 segments in filename (Account_Fund_DocType_DocName_PublishedDate_EffectiveDate) but found @{length(outputs('Parse_filename_metadata')?['segments'])}

Create_error_record_bad_filename.description: Creates error record when filename does not match expected convention. File stays on SFTP.

Validate_segment_count.description: Validates that filename has exactly 6 segments when split by delimiter.

Is_duplicate.description: Skips processing for duplicate files. Processes new files through metadata parsing, blob upload, Cosmos DB, and routing.
